feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Predictive Maintenance and Service
feed.subtitle: SAP Predictive Maintenance and Service Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Measuring Document creation for an Equipment
entry.content:
Hello All,

I searched a lot in the portal but was not able to find a similar question. That is why I am posting this question.

We have an equipment which is used as a PRT in a Routing, which is further used in Production Order.

We have already created a measuring point for this equipment. While confirming the production order a new measuring document is being created for this equipment.

But when I am using the same settings and the same process for an equipment from an equipment hierarchy it does not creates a measuring document while confirming the production order.

I have tried this with the parent equipment and the child equipment, but it does not work in both the cases for me.

Please can anybody suggest that what I doing wrong here or am I missing something.

entry.title: PM Maintenance Plan Scheduled Start Dates/Times
entry.content:
Good afternoon.

I have recently began a roll in maintenance planning. I am trying to find a way that I can set the dates and times for the basic start/end of the order. I can make the dates generate correctly, but I cannot figure out how to make the times work correctly. Any help will be greatly appreciated. Thank you for taking the time to consider my question.

Chris

entry.title: S/4 On-Premise Interface to 3rd party Systems
entry.content:
Dear Peers,

ODATA and SOAP API which can be used for Connecting S/4 to 3rd party system. I have few basic questions please.

1) Can I connect multiple legacy systems to S/4 as to bring there respective PO/GR data in to S/4 System ? as client has many legacy to manage and create PO/GR currently which they would retain in future and so we need to Interface between all of them to S/4 Now.

2) Can all this different Inbound and outbound systems be seamlessly be connected with both OData and SOAP API connectivity? as i see few OData API cater our need and some time it is SOAP which could do the JOB, so can we have both accordingly as required.

Thanks for going through my long query and giving a thought on it...

entry.title: The call horizon for strategy maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hey network,

I have a strategy with no default call horizon, the strategy has 2 packets (weekly, monthly). I created a task list with this strategy and assigned the packages to the operations.

i created a strategy plan for the task list an i put the call horizon as 10% so the call date for each package suppose to be:

  • weekly: 10%*7= 0.7 DAY ( the call is 6 days before the planned date)
  • monthly: 10%*30= 3 DAYS ( The call is 27 DAY BEFOR THE PLANNED DATE

Here come my problem the call date of the monthly is 6 days the same as the weekly packets.

What is the solution !!!


Kind regards, I appreciate your answers.

entry.title: BOM Usage and Accuracy
entry.content:
Hello Members,

I want to measure the BOM usage and BOM Accuracy from SAP. BOM Usage means that "Work Order Material Line Items where the material was added to the work order directly from BoM". BOM Accuracy means that "Work Order Material Line Items where the material is on a BoM on the work order Functional Location or up to 4 levels below".

Is there any t-codes or tables available in SAP to extract the report. How to identify or where is the mapping work order equipment structure BOM and work order material in SAP background?

entry.title: Stock(L) and NON stock item(N)
entry.content:
Team,

Good day guys.

Am not clear about the stock(L) and non stock item(N) in SAP PM. So i created a tasklist with all components in it (L )for plant A . I created and scheduled a single cycle PM plan and i found some items in the order (Components tab) are L and some are N. Not sure why ? Trying to understand the logic behind this.

Why would my tasklist show as stock item (L) for all the items, whereas the work order shows as (N) for few items & (L) for few items when i schedule the same tasklist.

Any help in understanding this logic highly appreciated.

Thanks,

N

entry.title: IW38 attachment
entry.content:
Hello all,

I would like to ask if somebody has a knowledge about how is it possible to filter orders witch attachment in transaction IW38?

I need this information for report. I ran a transaction IW38 but I am not see difference between orders with and without attachments.

Thank you

entry.title: Counter Based Maintenance - Warnings in Regulated industry
entry.content:
HI All,

I am wondering if anyone has any suggestions on how to create warnings for counter based in SAP.

Our counter is set in 100hrs. Our PMs are issued 70 hours and at 90 hours i will like send warning to team that they have 10 hours of running time left before PM and it will deviate our Regulatory rules.

Does SAP has the capacity to send this warnings (emails, or other ways)? Do you have any suggests, help here will be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

Kofi

entry.title: My Inbox app- Plant maintenance
entry.content: My Inbox FIORI app has been activated,but no Plant maintenance notification/Order are reflecting. What are the configuration required from Plant maintenance perspective?

entry.title: Planned date performance based maintenace strategy plan
entry.content:
While creating performance based maintenace strategy plan the work order is released before the counter reached the set measures,

for example i put the order to be released when the counter reach 50k kilometers but due to the planned date the order released when its only 40k .

So, can i disable the planned date and order released only when it reachs 50k ??

entry.title: Work order printing in 2023
entry.content:
Hi Guys.

I Was wondering if there is an SAP version where I don't need to print off the work orders.

I cannot believe that I waste 2 days of my week printing, confirming with a stamp, TECO and archiving work orders. It's 2023 and I cannot understand why SAP does not have a digital way of completing maintenance straight from our Technician's Laptops. Paper less is the way.

entry.title: the tenants provided for practice dont't work
entry.content:
hello, I'm a student who is trying to learn SAP businessbydesign SCM, i have no basic knowledge on SAP and i don't belong to any company since i'm still a student, i would like to start the cource and practice in the software but it's not working for me, could you please help me, what should i do?

i already installed the SAP software in my my laptop but i no access for it

PS: i live in FRANCE

entry.title: SAP on premise test in local
entry.content:
Hello,

I am new to SAP, I am currently trying to make some test using SAP.

Our client want to have our low code application to communicate with their SAP on premise environment.

To test that I was wondering If I could simulate an SAP environment on my local machine, and if so, how to do it?

Every suggestion is much appreciate.

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Difference between On Premise ,Public Cloud & private In SAP PM implementation
entry.content:
Hello All,

Hope you are doing well. Can someone please guide me to understand all the differences between S/4 Hana On premise , Public cloud and private cloud in implementing SAP PM.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Export data from Maintenance Plan, Maintenance Item and task lists
entry.content: I'm trying to find a way to export data from a number of Maintenance Plans/Maintenance Items in particular: frequency of execution and durations (hours) of the associated tasks - can anyone suggest a suitable T code to achieve this? Thanks

entry.title: How EMI works??
entry.content:
Hi

I know monthly equated emi and it's formula also

But if I choose quarterly, half yearly or yearly then when I have to pay my first emi in next month or depending on quarterly half yearly or yearly ex my disbursement date is 11th nov and cycle date is 5th of month then if I choose quarterly then my first emi will be on 5th dec or 5th may

And how graded emi works I tried to search bt I can't find in Google.

entry.title: SAP PM - Gage Calibration Strategy ?
entry.content: Situation, I am attempting to setup a gage calibration process in S/4, I have master data setup, I have Characteristic and Measuring Points with upper and lower limit defined. I have general task setup with 24 month strategy pack. What i can not figure out is how to setup a a multi condition strategy to schedule a work order at 24th from last calibration date or when the calipers fall out of tolerance example, I have a digital caliper that needs to be calibrated every 24 months or when measuring tolerance fall out of upper or lower limits... i.e. upper limit is 1.05 mm and lower limit is .99, normal is 1.02.. there is a tolerance +/- .03

entry.title: HOW TO CHANGE COUNTER BASED MAINTENANCE PLAN INTERVAL IF COUNTER IS CHANGED?
entry.content:
Hello,

How to change counter based (hour) maintenance plan interval, if counter meter (h) is changed during interval and new counter start 0h (cannot set current hour value to meter)?

Example (strategig hierarchical)

1.Maintenance "small" 500 hour

2.Maintenance "medium" 1500 hour

3. Maintenance "big" 3000 Hour

Counter rmeter change in 250 h

entry.title: Visual Studio Code - SAP Fiori elements
entry.content:
Good morning, the service created in sap in transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE is active,
working, code 200 ok, however, when using visual studio code the service is not available, 
with the error:
Authentication incorrect! AxiosError: Request failed with status code 403

I connected via on premise, it connected well to the sap client, 
but the service was unavailable, could someone please help me.

Grateful

entry.title: How to show information (which marked with yellow in picture) as a list for multiple notifications
entry.content: How to show information (which marked with yellow in picture) as a list for multiple notifications (IW52)
